name: Chicken and Spinach Quiche
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Frozen chopped spinach, drained (½ cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pierce the pastry shell thoroughly with a fork.
2. Bake in a 375 degree oven for 10 minutes; remove from the oven and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, toss together chicken, cheese, spinach, and onion; spoon into the pastry shell.
4. In a small bowl, stir together eggs, mayonnaise, milk, basil, and pepper until smooth.
5. Pour the egg mixture over the chicken mixture.
6. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 40 minutes or until golden brown and a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
